textByHash.03efe32fd5ff777a6ce8b77e00d450234479114c: These dwarves have arrived from Keldagrim - the Chancellor has asked me to look after them, but they are eating all of our food and drinking all of our booze.
textByHash.2eb18a78bb40a397c25621d14206db05059a285d: Thanks! I didn't expect that. Maybe you do have a heart.
textByHash.333e691ab181f6734445a766b4fa087c0c142952: They are organising some sort of trade agreement. I don't know what they are trading.
textByHash.3348505eef4292c3fdb0d9ca6a2214cd6e5bdeed: Feel free to leave it. Please leave.
textByHash.4917df870e90a085be7165094da965196eceb2fc: That's not right. I'm not paying you that much!
textByHash.5ed8f2026191584a8ecda6e16ff2ac7219e6e40f: Well, any time you need black market yak produce, you know where to come.
textByHash.663c7047f24b3b6e24616cb7082d09254af848fa: Well as you probably already know, all yak meat and yak products are banned on this island - orders of the King...
textByHash.752e7a079bce784be178a5412edba1384da25063: [sigh] It seems a lot of money for some windows.
textByHash.7b3af601aef35168bb35589687f9ce34873fd2e3: But we only paid our Island Tax last week!
textByHash.9fc3eeba0123a1ad0b234e805c5ec5e3dcf743f3: Well as you probably already know all yak meat and yak products are banned on this island - orders of the King ...
textByHash.afef1126213c3a0887de3f99c60618526c5d5fd7: Oh, hello . Always good to see a friend.
textByHash.c28db2f97012ad9aa499062501c8cea3107edb7b: What? Can't you count? I'm not paying my tax to someone who can't count.
textByHash.cd11223cbd39bdba813a41ba176ec6a25bcf2dba: Hmmm, I suppose I can trust you, since you have done me a favour in the past. Can you keep a secret?
textByHash.d81bfcb91a86c3427229731c7362915dcd8cf06c: Please, someone get these guys their ore quickly. They are eating all the good food on the island, and complaining about it!
textByHash.ee78ee6b5f09da879463ce749b9430e9da34bb86: Thank you, thank you! I owe you one.
textByHash.f3aa2177a9dd9e58ba6e25ca97a87449891b9f7c: That's funny, I called it fourteen meals yesterday.
textByHash.f7594b642313a6587dd340980b8f5dba6299afae: Well, I have a contact on the other island. Are you interested in obtaining some produce?
